description: Walks the precomputed supplier-graph downstream from one or more affected suppliers to the finished products they feed, returning every impacted path. Each path gives the ordered supplier_chain (root affected supplier first, as JSON), the component flowing through it, the finished product, hop count, and any routing chokepoint (route_via, e.g. a port). Used by the Tracer after match_event_to_suppliers. Input: supplier_ids (array of affected supplier ids).

configuration.query:
FROM supplier-graph-paths
| WHERE MV_CONTAINS(?supplier_ids, root_supplier_id)
| KEEP path_id, root_supplier_id, supplier_chain_json, component_id, component_name, product_id, product_name, hops, route_via
| SORT root_supplier_id, product_id, component_id
| LIMIT 1000

supplier_ids.description: Affected supplier ids to traverse downstream from, e.g. ['sup-vadodara-chem'].
